title: Industrial Pressure Washing Company for Sale
description:
G ID # 37145


Rapidly growing industrial washout and pressure washing business serving the oil & gas and equipment rental industries. Founded in April 2024, the company has demonstrated strong early traction and market demand, generating approximately $700K in trailing twelve-month (TTM) gross revenue. The business produces an estimated $130K in owner's cash flow and is supported by a solid base of 80–90 recurring commercial customers, providing consistent and reliable revenue. The sale includes approximately $100K in equipment and assets, transferable permits, trained staff, and a long-term lease with a purchase option, offering a stable and scalable operational foundation. Significant growth opportunities remain through expanded marketing efforts, securing additional service contracts, and increasing penetration into new industrial accounts. The owner is flexible and open to negotiating the sale structure, including potential terms for qualified buyers. Asking Price: $500K (Assets transferred debt-free at closing) More detailed financial information is available to serious, qualified buyers upon completion of a non-disclosure agreement. For more information, contact broker: Derek Jones

Ad#:2491911
